name: Cloudbeds Hospitality Management API
what_it_does: Cloudbeds REST API for all-in-one hospitality management platform. Enables AI agents to manage reservations, rooms, rates, availability, guest profiles, payments, housekeeping, and channel distribution across hotels, B&Bs, hostels, and vacation rentals. Cloudbeds combines PMS, channel manager, and booking engine in a unified platform for independent and boutique properties.
use_cases: Managing reservations and availability from booking automation agents
Synchronizing rates and inventory with OTAs from distribution management agents
Processing guest check-in and billing from front desk automation agents
Querying revenue and occupancy data from hospitality analytics agents
not_for: Large enterprise hotel chains without independent property management needs
Simple booking calendar without full PMS and channel management
best_when: An independent hotel, B&B, hostel, or vacation rental using Cloudbeds wants AI agents to automate reservation management, channel distribution, and guest operations.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Guest personal and payment data requires PCI-DSS compliance. Guest data includes identification and payment information.

auth.notes: Cloudbeds uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization code flow for partner apps. Each property must separately authorize. Scopes available for different operations. Developer sandbox available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier; developer sandbox available for integration testing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-property subscription; integrations marketplace for tech partners
pricing.notes: US company serving independent hospitality globally. Tech partner program for integrations. Developer portal with sandbox access.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth app; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Guest personal data and payment info — PCI-DSS and GDPR compliance required
No public MCP server — REST API with per-property OAuth authorization
Per-property OAuth installation: each hotel must independently authorize your app
Rate limits per OAuth app — scale considerations for multi-property operators
Channel manager integration handles OTA sync separately from core PMS API
Tech partner program approval needed for production marketplace listing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Guest PII and payment data. PCI-DSS, GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2 with per-property auth. US company with global deployments.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest PII and payment data. PCI-DSS, GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2 per-property authorization.
